triage_rows.detail: Horizon sanity does not authorize wider surface expansion.
Horizon sanity is supervisory only and does not convert same-day shadow optimization into replay binding.

interpretation: V1.34AH converts the horizon sanity audit into the next supervision judgment.
The branch is allowed to keep the same-day optimal full-reversal reference, but the result must stay explicitly labeled as horizon-limited if later rebound opportunity cost remains material.
